hero.name: Terry Taewoong Um
hero.tagline: AI & Robotics Researcher · Innovating Manufacturing with Physical AI
hero.bio_short: I studied robotics at Seoul National University and researched deep learning for human/robot motion at the University of Waterloo. In 2019, I founded ART Lab, a beauty-AI startup that brought AI & Robotics Tech to the beauty industry. In 2024, ART Lab was acquired by Cosmax, the world's #1 cosmetics ODM company. I now lead AI & Robotics Tech at Cosmax, driving manufacturing innovation through Physical AI.

bio_detailed.heading: Starting with Robots
bio_detailed.content: I built my foundation in robotics studying Mechanical & Aerospace Engineering at Seoul National University. After graduation, I developed defense robots at LIG Nex1 and research robots at KIST, gaining hands-on engineering experience.

bio_detailed.heading: Discovering Deep Learning
bio_detailed.content: At the University of Waterloo, I researched applying deep learning to human and robot motion. This experience convinced me that AI could fundamentally transform robotics.

bio_detailed.heading: Founding a Beauty-AI Startup
bio_detailed.content: In 2019, I left my PhD program and returned to Korea to found ART Lab (AI & Robotics Tech Lab). We brought AI and robotics technology to the beauty industry, creating innovative solutions for skin analysis and personalized cosmetics recommendations.

bio_detailed.heading: Cosmax and Physical AI
bio_detailed.content: After being acquired by Cosmax, the world's #1 cosmetics ODM company, in 2024, I took on the role of AI & Robotics Tech Lead. I'm now on a mission to revolutionize manufacturing with Physical AI, integrating my experiences across robotics, AI, beauty startups, and cosmetics manufacturing.

write_index.title: What I write
write_index.description: Thoughts on AI, robotics, startups, and manufacturing innovation.

read_index.title: What I read
read_index.description: Key takeaways from papers and articles I find interesting.
